Localization.Description: Attempt to perform an operation on an application load balancer

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} stopped application load balancer {object.name} of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is starting application load balancer {object.name} of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is unable to stop application load balancer {object.name} of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} changed application load balancer {object.name} of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} created application load balancer {object.name} of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is changing application load balancer {object.name} of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is stopping application load balancer {object.name} of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is deleting application load balancer {object.name} of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} deleted application load balancer {object.name} of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is creating application load balancer {object.name} of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} started application load balancer {object.name} of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is unable to change application load balancer {object.name} of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} is unable to start application load balancer {object.name} of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} is unable to create application load balancer {object.name} of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} is unable to delete application load balancer {object.name} of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
